exploration_notes: The JVM bytecode interpreter implementation spans shared (platform-independent) and per-CPU-architecture files. The core dispatch loop and dispatch table live in templateInterpreter.cpp (DispatchTable class, _active_table/_normal_table). Template generation orchestration is in templateInterpreterGenerator.cpp (generate_all → set_entry_points_for_all_bytes, method_entry macro for each entry point kind). The bytecode template definitions and platform-independent helpers are in templateTable.cpp. E
